summary: Completed testing of Vulnerabilidades GRC Integration (Iteration 14). Fixed missing control_id and riesgo_id fields in VulnerabilidadBase model. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend UI shows GRC section with Dominio→Control cascading dropdowns and Risk catalog search modal working correctly.

issues: Search by 'codigo' field not supported - only searches in vulnerabilidad, aplicaciones, responsable, nombre_informe_pentest

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/config/controles returns all controles with enriched dominio name
Backend: GET /api/config/controles?dominio_id=X filters correctly (4 controls for Seguridad EndPoints)
Backend: GET /api/catalogo-riesgos/all returns all riesgos (R-0001 Fraude de identidad masivo)
Backend: POST /api/vulnerabilidades with control_id saves and returns control_id
Backend: POST /api/vulnerabilidades with riesgo_id saves and returns riesgo_id
Backend: POST /api/vulnerabilidades with both control_id and riesgo_id works
UI: Nueva Vulnerabilidad form shows 'Vinculación GRC' section
UI: Dominio dropdown lists all 6 dominios
UI: Control dropdown cascades based on selected Dominio (shows 4 CTRL-EP controls for Seguridad EndPoints)
UI: 'Riesgo del Catálogo' field opens search modal on click
UI: Risk search modal shows R-0001 Fraude de identidad masivo
UI: Selecting risk updates field with 'R-0001 - Fraude de identidad masivo'
UI: Saving vulnerability with control_id and riesgo_id works (success toast shown)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (added control_id and riesgo_id to VulnerabilidadBase model)
seed_data_creation: Test vulnerabilities created and cleaned up during testing. Existing seed data: 6 Dominios, 4 Controles (all for Seguridad EndPoints), 1 Riesgo in catalog (R-0001).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested Vulnerabilidades GRC integration. Key fix: Added control_id and riesgo_id fields to VulnerabilidadBase model in server.py (lines 122-141). The frontend form at /app/frontend/src/pages/Vulnerabilidades.jsx already had the GRC section implemented with: 1) Dominio dropdown (lines 1407-1432) that filters controls, 2) Control Asociado dropdown (lines 1434-1453) that shows filtered controls, 3) Riesgo del Catálogo field (lines 1456-1491) with search modal. The view modal shows GRC section when control_id or riesgo_id exists (lines 1182-1216). Edit form loads existing control_id and riesgo_id values correctly (lines 399-410).

bug_fix_applied.issue: VulnerabilidadBase model missing control_id and riesgo_id fields
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'control_id: Optional[str] = None' and 'riesgo_id: Optional[str] = None' to VulnerabilidadBase class
bug_fix_applied.verification: All 9 backend tests pass, UI creates/updates vulnerabilities with GRC fields correctly
